_description: Google Ad Technology Providers (ATP) list — provider ID to name mapping. Used to resolve AC String (addtl_consent cookie) vendor IDs to company names. These are non-IAB vendors that receive consent through Google Additional Consent Mode.

89.name: Meta
concerns: Facebook pixel on millions of sites
Cross-company data sharing across Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, Messenger, and Meta Quest
Off-Facebook activity tracking via integrated partners

144.name: Constant Contact
concerns: Email open and click tracking via pixel beacons

311.name: Dstillery
concerns: AI-powered audience data and custom targeting
Cookieless ID solutions for cross-site tracking

486.name: Tradedoubler AB
concerns: European affiliate and performance marketing network
Cross-site conversion tracking and click attribution

550.name: CyberAgent
concerns: Major Japanese ad-tech company with programmatic DSP

576.name: MicroAd
concerns: SSP and DSP with extensive publisher network

591.name: Miaozhen Systems
concerns: Major Chinese ad verification and digital analytics

938.name: Adzerk
concerns: Ad serving API infrastructure used by major platforms
Custom ad delivery with first-party data

1067.name: Mail.ru
concerns: Major Russian advertising and social platform
Cross-site tracking via mail.ru and VK widgets

1230.name: Ligatus
concerns: Content recommendation and native ad tracking

1268.name: Adcash
concerns: Global ad network with display, native, and push advertising
Programmatic targeting across web and mobile
